title: Kilrock Limescale Remover Power Spray Cleaner 500ml - Rapid Action Formula - 100% Limescale Removal, Destroys Hard Water Stains - Perfect for Bathrooms, Sinks, Shower Screens, Toilets, Baths.
features: 100% LIMESCALE REMOVAL – Powerful limescale remover spray that tackles even the toughest buildup, restoring surfaces to their original shine.
DESTROYS HARD WATER STAINS – Effectively breaks down hard water marks and mineral deposits on taps, tiles, shower screens, and sinks.
HEAVY DUTY POWER SPRAY CLEANER – Lifts dirt, bathroom scum, and grime with ease, making cleaning quicker and more effective.
PERFECT FOR KITCHENS & BATHROOMS – Versatile formula ideal for use on bathroom surfaces, kitchen sinks, tiles, and fixtures.
LEAVES A LONG LASTING SHINE – Not only cleans, but polishes surfaces for a streak-free, gleaming finish that lasts.
